preferences.name: build
preferences.title: Build
preferences.description: Select which build of Gram to use

preferences.name: showGitBranch
preferences.title: Git Integration
preferences.label: Show Git Branch
preferences.description: Display the current Git branch for files and folders in Git repositories

preferences.name: projectIconStyle
preferences.title: Visual Customization
preferences.description: Choose how project icons are displayed

preferences.name: showOpenStatus
preferences.label: Show Open Status
preferences.description: Display an 'Open' tag for projects currently open in Gram

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
